---
title: "Page Not Found"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/games/common.css">
          <script src="/assets/games/common.js" defer></script>
          <script src="/assets/games/registry.js" defer></script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="mlsp-404-banner" role="alert">
  <strong>404 — you arrived here because the page is missing.</strong> The URL may have moved, or it never existed. Enjoy a game while you figure out where you were going.
</div>

<p class="mlsp-404-nav">Looking for something? <a href="/">home</a> · <a href="/vol1/">Volume I</a> · <a href="/vol2/">Volume II</a> · <a href="/games/">more games</a> · <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new">report broken link</a></p>

<div class="mlsp-game-container" role="region" aria-label="Random MLSys Playground mini-game">
  <canvas id="mlsp-canvas" class="mlsp-game-canvas" width="680" height="460"></canvas>
  <div class="mlsp-game-hud">
    <span class="mlsp-score" id="mlsp-hud">loading game…</span>
    <span id="mlsp-hint">&nbsp;</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="mlsp-aha-slot"></div>

<p class="mlsp-404-more">More games at <a href="/games/">/games/</a> · <a href="/">Back to mlsysbook.ai</a></p>

<script>
(function mount404Game(){
  function boot() {
    if (!window.MLSP || !MLSP.pickRandomGame) return setTimeout(boot, 30);
    var game = MLSP.pickRandomGame();
    if (!game) {
      document.getElementById("mlsp-hud").textContent = "no games available";
      return;
    }
    // Dynamically load the chosen game's script, then mount it.
    var s = document.createElement("script");
    s.src = game.script;
    s.onload = function() {
      if (!MLSP.games || !MLSP.games[game.id]) {
        document.getElementById("mlsp-hud").textContent = "game failed to load";
        return;
      }
      var canvas = document.getElementById("mlsp-canvas");
      var $hud  = document.getElementById("mlsp-hud");
      var $hint = document.getElementById("mlsp-hint");
      var ahaSlot = document.getElementById("mlsp-aha-slot");
      $hint.innerHTML = "playing <strong>" + game.name + "</strong> · <kbd>R</kbd> to retry";
      var api = MLSP.games[game.id](canvas, {
        onScoreChange: function(s) {
          if (typeof s.accuracy === "number" && typeof s.sparsity === "number") {
            $hud.textContent = s.accuracy.toFixed(1) + "% acc · " + s.sparsity.toFixed(0) + "% sparse";
          }
        },
        onGameOver: function(result) {
          MLSP.showAhaCard(ahaSlot, api.ahaLabel, api.ahaText);
          var card = ahaSlot.querySelector(".mlsp-aha-card");
          if (card && api.buildShareText && result) {
            var share = document.createElement("button");
            share.type = "button";
            share.textContent = "📋 Copy share text";
            share.style.cssText = "margin-top:0.75rem;background:#a31f34;color:#fff;border:none;padding:0.4rem 0.85rem;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;";
            share.addEventListener("click", function() {
              var txt = api.buildShareText(result);
              if (navigator.clipboard) {
                navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt).then(function(){
                  share.textContent = "✓ Copied!";
                  setTimeout(function(){ share.textContent = "📋 Copy share text"; }, 1800);
                });
              }
            });
            card.appendChild(share);
          }
        },
        onRetry: function() { window.location.reload(); }
      });
    };
    s.onerror = function() {
      document.getElementById("mlsp-hud").textContent = "game script failed to load";
    };
    document.head.appendChild(s);
  }
  boot();
})();
</script>
```

## 🧭 Still lost?

- [🏠 mlsysbook.ai](/) — the unified landing page
- [📖 Volume I: Foundations](/vol1/) · [📖 Volume II: At Scale](/vol2/)
- [🔥 TinyTorch](/tinytorch/) · [🔮 Labs](/labs/) · [📦 Hardware Kits](/kits/) · [🧮 MLSys·im](/mlsysim/)
- [🎞️ Slides](/slides/) · [🎓 Instructor Hub](/instructors/) · [🎯 StaffML](/staffml/)
- [📝 Report a broken link](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new) · [💬 Ask the community](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions)

---

*"Every system has a 404 page. Welcome to ours."* 🪐
